userQuestion: How do I create an account?
correctAnswer: Click on the Sign Up page, enter your name, email, and password, then verify your email address. Your account will be created instantly.

userQuestion: How do I reset my password?
correctAnswer: Go to Login page, click on 'Forgot Password', enter your registered email, and follow the reset link sent to your inbox.

userQuestion: How do I login to my account?
correctAnswer: Visit the Login page, enter your email and password, then click Sign In. You'll be redirected to your account dashboard.

userQuestion: Can I edit my profile?
correctAnswer: Yes, go to My Account > Edit Profile to update your first name, last name, email, and address information.

userQuestion: How do I view my orders?
correctAnswer: Go to My Account > My Orders to see all your previous orders with order details, tracking, and status.

userQuestion: What should I do if my order is delayed?
correctAnswer: Contact our support team at support@exclusive.com or call +8801611112222. We're available 24/7 to help resolve shipping delays.

userQuestion: How can I cancel my order?
correctAnswer: Visit My Account > My Orders, find the order you want to cancel, and click Cancel. Orders can only be cancelled before they're shipped.

userQuestion: How do I track my delivery?
correctAnswer: Go to My Account > My Orders and click on your order to see the real-time tracking information and estimated delivery date.

userQuestion: What are the available payment methods?
correctAnswer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, digital wallets, and bank transfers. You can select your preferred payment method during checkout.

userQuestion: How much does shipping cost?
correctAnswer: Shipping costs are calculated based on your location and order weight. You'll see the exact shipping cost before confirming your order at checkout.

userQuestion: Do you offer free shipping?
correctAnswer: Free shipping is available on orders over $100 within our service areas. Check your order summary during checkout to see if you qualify.

userQuestion: Can I change my delivery address?
correctAnswer: You can change the delivery address before checkout. After the order is placed, contact support@exclusive.com to request address changes.

userQuestion: Do you deliver to my area?
correctAnswer: We deliver to 50+ cities worldwide. Enter your postal code during checkout to verify if delivery is available in your area.

userQuestion: How long does delivery take?
correctAnswer: Standard delivery takes 3-7 business days. Express delivery is available and takes 1-2 business days for an additional fee.
